name: shareyourcloning-linkml

metadata.name: shareyourcloning-linkml
metadata.summary: A LinkML data model for ShareYourCloning

documentation:
# ShareYourCloning_LinkML

A LinkML data model for ShareYourCloning
<!--  -->

## Website

[https://genestorian.github.io/ShareYourCloning_LinkML](https://genestorian.github.io/ShareYourCloning_LinkML)

## Repository Structure

* [examples/](examples/) - example data
* [project/](project/) - project files (do not edit these)
* [src/](src/) - source files (edit these)
  * [shareyourcloning_linkml](src/shareyourcloning_linkml)
    * [schema](src/shareyourcloning_linkml/schema) -- LinkML schema
      (edit this)
    * [datamodel](src/shareyourcloning_linkml/datamodel) -- generated
      Python datamodel
* [tests/](tests/) - Python tests

## Developer Documentation

<details>
Use the `make` command to generate project artefacts:

* `make all`: make everything
* `make deploy`: deploys site
</details>

## Credits

This project was made with
[linkml-project-cookiecutter](https://github.com/linkml/linkml-project-cookiecutter).

classes.name: shareyourcloning_linkml.datamodel._models.Sequence
documentation: Represents a sequence

classes.name: shareyourcloning_linkml.datamodel._models.TextFileSequence
documentation: A sequence (may have features) defined by the content of a text file

classes.name: shareyourcloning_linkml.datamodel._models.Primer
documentation: An oligonucleotide or primer

classes.name: shareyourcloning_linkml.datamodel._models.SequenceCut
documentation: Represents a cut in a DNA sequence

classes.name: shareyourcloning_linkml.datamodel._models.RestrictionSequenceCut
documentation: Represents a cut in a DNA sequence that is made by a restriction enzyme

classes.name: shareyourcloning_linkml.datamodel._models.Source
documentation: Represents the source of a sequence

classes.name: shareyourcloning_linkml.datamodel._models.ManuallyTypedSource
documentation: Represents the source of a sequence that is manually typed by the user

classes.name: shareyourcloning_linkml.datamodel._models.UploadedFileSource
documentation: Represents the source of a sequence that is uploaded as a file

classes.name: shareyourcloning_linkml.datamodel._models.RepositoryIdSource
documentation: Represents the source of a sequence that is identified by a repository id

classes.name: shareyourcloning_linkml.datamodel._models.AddGeneIdSource
documentation: Represents the source of a sequence that is identified by an AddGene id

classes.name: shareyourcloning_linkml.datamodel._models.BenchlingUrlSource
documentation: Represents the source of a sequence that is identified by a Benchling URL

classes.name: shareyourcloning_linkml.datamodel._models.SnapGenePlasmidSource
documentation: Represents the source of a sequence from the SnapGene plasmid library identified by a SnapGene subpath of https://www.snapgene.com/plasmids/

classes.name: shareyourcloning_linkml.datamodel._models.EuroscarfSource
documentation: Represents the source of a sequence from the Euroscarf plasmid library

classes.name: shareyourcloning_linkml.datamodel._models.IGEMSource
documentation: Represents the source of a sequence from an iGEM collection

classes.name: shareyourcloning_linkml.datamodel._models.GenomeCoordinatesSource
documentation: Represents the source of a sequence that is identified by genome coordinates, requested from NCBI

classes.name: shareyourcloning_linkml.datamodel._models.SequenceCutSource
documentation: Represents the source of a sequence that is a subfragment of another sequence, generated by sequence cutting.

classes.name: shareyourcloning_linkml.datamodel._models.RestrictionEnzymeDigestionSource
documentation: Represents the source of a sequence that is a subfragment of another sequence, generated by sequence cutting using restriction enzymes.

classes.name: shareyourcloning_linkml.datamodel._models.SimpleSequenceLocation
documentation: Represents a location within a sequence, for now support for ranges only

classes.name: shareyourcloning_linkml.datamodel._models.AssemblyFragment
documentation: Represents a fragment in an assembly

classes.name: shareyourcloning_linkml.datamodel._models.AssemblySource
documentation: Represents the source of a sequence that is an assembly of other sequences

classes.name: shareyourcloning_linkml.datamodel._models.PCRSource
documentation: Represents the source of a sequence that is generated by PCR

classes.name: shareyourcloning_linkml.datamodel._models.LigationSource
documentation: Represents the source of a sequence that is generated by ligation with sticky or blunt ends.

classes.name: shareyourcloning_linkml.datamodel._models.HomologousRecombinationSource
documentation: Represents the source of a sequence that is generated by homologous recombination

classes.name: shareyourcloning_linkml.datamodel._models.GibsonAssemblySource
documentation: Represents the source of a sequence that is generated by Gibson assembly

classes.name: shareyourcloning_linkml.datamodel._models.InFusionSource
documentation: Represents the source of a sequence that is generated by In-Fusion cloning by Takara Bio

classes.name: shareyourcloning_linkml.datamodel._models.OverlapExtensionPCRLigationSource
documentation: Represents the source of a sequence that is generated by ligation of PCR products as part of overlap extension PCR. Algorithmically equivalent to Gibson assembly.

classes.name: shareyourcloning_linkml.datamodel._models.RestrictionAndLigationSource
documentation: Represents the source of a sequence that is generated by restriction and ligation

classes.name: shareyourcloning_linkml.datamodel._models.GatewaySource
documentation: Represents the source of a sequence that is generated by Gateway cloning

classes.name: shareyourcloning_linkml.datamodel._models.CRISPRSource
documentation: Represents the source of a sequence that is generated by CRISPR

classes.name: shareyourcloning_linkml.datamodel._models.OligoHybridizationSource
documentation: Represents the source of a sequence that is generated by oligo hybridization

classes.name: shareyourcloning_linkml.datamodel._models.PolymeraseExtensionSource
documentation: Represents the source of a sequence that is generated by polymerase extension

classes.name: shareyourcloning_linkml.datamodel._models.CloningStrategy
documentation: Represents a cloning strategy

classes.name: shareyourcloning_linkml.datamodel._models.AnnotationReport
documentation: Represents a report of an annotation step

classes.name: shareyourcloning_linkml.datamodel._models.PlannotateAnnotationReport
documentation: Represents a report of an annotation step using Plannotate

classes.name: shareyourcloning_linkml.datamodel._models.AnnotationSource
documentation: Represents a computational step in which sequence features are annotated in a sequence
